user.title: XHK1 Alarmo Keypad
user.description: Connect the XHK1 Zigbee keypad to Alarmo via Zigbee2MQTT.

data_description.mqtt_topic: Example: 0x00158d00012345ab or the friendly name you gave the device in Zigbee2MQTT.
data_description.alarmo_entity: Select the alarm_control_panel entity created by Alarmo.

error.no_alarm_entity: No alarm_control_panel entities found. Make sure Alarmo is installed and configured.

abort.already_configured: This keypad and alarm panel combination is already configured.
